hero.description: Equilybrium monitors your team's digital workload patterns and surfaces what needs your attention — quietly, before it becomes urgent.
hero.img.alt: Professional commuting on a train, looking out the window
theReality.label: The reality
theReality.heading.emphasis: It accumulates — quietly — until something breaks.
theReality.body: Whether you're a knowledge worker running on fumes or an HR lead watching your team's energy decline, the signal is always there. Equilybrium helps you read it before the damage is done.
builtForBoth.label: Built for both
builtForBoth.heading.line2: For the team you're responsible for.
builtForBoth.individuals.label: For knowledge workers
builtForBoth.individuals.headline: You've been running at
builtForBoth.individuals.body: You know something's off. The focus is scattered, the recovery never quite happens, the weekend doesn't feel like enough. Equilybrium gives you a personal picture of your digital workload and tells you, calmly, when to pull back before you hit the wall.
builtForBoth.companies.label: For HR & people leads
builtForBoth.companies.headline: By the time you hear about it,
builtForBoth.companies.body: Burnout shows up in resignation letters and exit interviews, never early enough. Equilybrium gives your HR team a quiet early warning system, built on workload patterns rather than surveys, so you can step in at exactly the right moment.
whatWeDo.label: What Equilybrium does
whatWeDo.body: Equilybrium uses AI to analyze your work patterns, sleep data, and health metrics. It surfaces early signs of burnout weeks before you feel them, giving you time to act.
whatWeDo.features.0.title: Early detection
whatWeDo.features.0.desc: Identifies burnout signals 3 to 4 weeks before traditional methods. Patterns emerge in your data long before they surface as symptoms.
whatWeDo.features.1.title: Personalized insights
whatWeDo.features.1.desc: Machine learning builds a model of your unique rhythms. Recommendations adapt to your patterns, not generic averages.
whatWeDo.features.2.title: Continuous monitoring
whatWeDo.features.2.desc: A daily wellness score drawn from your activity, sleep, and workload. Track trends over time and understand what drives your energy.
whyEquilybrium.heading: Why Equilybrium?
whyEquilybrium.manifesto: Equilibrium is the point where effort and recovery meet. Where ambition stops costing your health.
whyEquilybrium.body: We built Equilybrium because that balance should not be something you find by accident after burning out. It should be something you can see, measure, and protect.
privacy.label: Privacy & Trust
privacy.heading: Your wellbeing data requires a different standard.
privacy.body: Whether you are an individual or an HR lead, the answer to “what does the other side see?” should always be: nothing they should not. Equilybrium is built around that commitment.
privacy.pillars.0.title: Individual data never reaches employers
privacy.pillars.0.desc: Your personal plan data is yours alone. Managers only ever see team-level, anonymized patterns.
privacy.pillars.1.title: Full transparency on both sides
privacy.pillars.1.desc: Everyone, individuals and teams, can see exactly what is monitored. Opt out of anything, anytime.
privacy.pillars.2.title: GDPR & SOC 2 compliant
privacy.pillars.2.desc: Enterprise-grade security for companies. Personal data sovereignty for individuals.
pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.heading: Start free. Scale when your team is ready.
pricing.footer.individuals: 14-day free trial on all paid plans · Cancel anytime
pricing.footer.business: All business plans include implementation support and training.

getStarted.label: Get started
getStarted.heading.line1: A team that doesn't burn out
getStarted.body: Start free as an individual, or bring Equilybrium to your whole team. Either way, the best time to start is before anyone feels it.
footer.description: For your mind, for your life. AI powered burnout prevention that keeps you balanced, productive, and healthy.
footer.tagline: For your mind, for your life.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.categories.gettingStarted.label: Getting Started
faq.categories.gettingStarted.items.0.a: Equilybrium is a comprehensive wellness platform that uses AI and machine learning to help prevent burnout. It analyzes your work patterns, sleep data, and health metrics to provide personalized insights and early warnings about potential burnout risks.
faq.categories.gettingStarted.items.1.q: What do I need to get started?
faq.categories.gettingStarted.items.1.a: We recommend installing the Desktop Agent, which is required to reach 85% accuracy, the Browser Extension for productivity tracking, and optionally the Mobile App for health data from wearables. The more data sources you connect, the more accurate your burnout predictions become.
faq.categories.gettingStarted.items.2.q: How long is the free trial?
faq.categories.gettingStarted.items.2.a: New users receive a 30 day free trial with full access to all paid plan features. No credit card is required to start. After the trial, you can upgrade to a paid plan or continue with the free tier.
faq.categories.gettingStarted.items.3.q: How quickly will I see insights?
faq.categories.gettingStarted.items.3.a: You will see initial data within hours of installing the Desktop Agent. Our ML models need at least 7 days of data for reliable predictions and reach optimal accuracy after 30 days of continuous usage.
faq.categories.billing.label: Account & Billing
faq.categories.billing.items.0.a: Pro costs $9.99 per month when billed monthly, or $99.99 per year, which saves 17%, when billed annually. All prices include taxes where applicable. Business pricing is available for organizations with 10 or more users.
faq.categories.billing.items.1.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.categories.billing.items.1.a: You can cancel anytime from Settings, then Subscription, then Cancel Plan. Your paid access continues until the end of your current billing period.
faq.categories.billing.items.2.q: What is the difference between Free and Pro?
faq.categories.billing.items.2.a: Pro includes all 8 wellness indicators, unlimited AI insights, 365 days of data history, PDF reports, priority support, and advanced analytics. The Free tier provides 4 core indicators, 1 AI insight per week, 90 days of history, and self service support.
faq.categories.billing.items.3.q: Will I get a refund if I cancel?
faq.categories.billing.items.3.a: We offer a 30 day money back guarantee for new Pro subscribers. If you are not satisfied within 30 days of upgrading, contact support for a full refund. After 30 days, cancellations take effect at the end of your billing period.
faq.categories.privacy.label: Privacy & Security
faq.categories.privacy.items.0.a: All data is encrypted using AES 256 both in transit with TLS 1.3 and at rest. We use secure cloud infrastructure with SOC 2 Type II certification. Your data is stored in compliance with GDPR, LGPD, and HIPAA regulations.
faq.categories.privacy.items.1.a: Never. Your personal data is never sold, shared, or used for advertising purposes. We only use your data to provide personalized wellness insights. You maintain full ownership of your data at all times.
faq.categories.privacy.items.2.q: Can my employer see my data?
faq.categories.privacy.items.2.a: For personal accounts, your data is completely private. For corporate accounts, employers see only anonymized, aggregated team statistics. Individual data is never visible to managers without your explicit consent.
faq.categories.privacy.items.3.a: Yes. Go to Settings, then Privacy, then Export Data. You can download all your data in JSON or CSV format. Pro users get unlimited exports. Free users can export once per month. Your data belongs to you, and you control it.
faq.categories.features.label: Features & Usage
faq.categories.features.items.0.a: With Desktop Agent and Browser Extension combined, accuracy reaches 85%. Adding the Mobile App can push that up to 98%. Our model is validated against clinical assessments, including BAT, CBI, and MBI, and continuously improves with more data.
faq.categories.features.items.1.a: Pro includes Burnout Risk, Sleep Quality, Work Life Balance, Mental Energy, Focus and Productivity, Physical Activity, Recovery Quality, and Stress Patterns. The Free tier provides the first 4 indicators.
faq.categories.features.items.2.a: The Confidence Score, from 0 to 100%, indicates how reliable your burnout prediction is based on data quality. More data sources and consistent usage increase that confidence. We recommend at least 70% confidence for actionable insights.
faq.categories.support.label: Technical Support
faq.categories.support.items.0.q: The Desktop Agent is not connecting. What should I do?
faq.categories.support.items.0.a: Check if the agent is running by looking for the tray icon. Restart the agent from the system tray. Verify that your firewall settings allow the connection. If needed, reinstall the agent. It uses port 54321 for browser communication.
faq.categories.support.items.1.q: My data is not syncing. How do I fix it?
faq.categories.support.items.1.a: Check your internet connection first. Pull down to refresh on mobile, click Sync Now in the Desktop Agent, or log out and back in to force a full sync. If issues persist, contact tech@equilybrium.health.
faq.categories.support.items.2.a: The Desktop Agent requires Windows 10 or 11, or macOS 10.15 and above, 100 MB of disk space, and 2 GB of RAM. The Mobile App requires iOS 14 and above, or Android 8.0 and above. The Browser Extension works with modern browsers including Chrome, Edge, Firefox, and Brave.
